meta.description: Editable validation language. Formula execution remains in TypeScript until the calculation engine is extracted.

messages.pfhFailure: PFH is above the selected SIL target. Review failure rate, diagnostic coverage or circuit architecture.
messages.beltDiscardReview: Belt suspension must be reviewed using belt-specific criteria, not rope diameter reduction.
messages.hydraulicSpeedLimit: Hydraulic configuration must remain at or below 1.0 m/s.
